controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated as the simple average of the total notional amount of outstanding nccds as at the end of march, april and may of a year
controls.control_description:
4.2 Average Aggregate Notional Amount of outstanding NCCDs
(1) AANA of outstanding NCCDs shall be calculated as the simple average of the total
notional amount of outstanding NCCDs as at the end of March, April and May of
a year.

controls.control_description:

and Foreign Covered Entities for a one-year period from September 1 of that year
to August 31 of the next year.

to an NCCD transaction if the counterparty is a Domestic Covered Entity or a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated on a daily basis, and called and exchanged at the earliest time possible after the transaction date ("t") or margin recalculation date (
controls.control_description:
Calculation and exchange of Variation Margin
(1) Variation Margin shall be calculated on a daily basis, and called and exchanged
at the earliest time possible after the transaction date ("T") or margin recalculation
date ("R"), but no later than three local business days from the transaction date
("T+3") or margin recalculation date ("R+3").
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated on a daily basis, and called and exchanged at the earliest time possible after the transaction date ("t") or margin recalculation date (

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied to all non-cash collateral received in a currency other than the base currency of the nccd transaction or eligible currencies as agreed to

An additional haircut of 8% shall be
applied to all non-cash collateral received in a currency other than the base
currency of the NCCD transaction or eligible currencies as agreed to in the credit
support annex.

related parties, shall not be accepted as collateral.

controls.control_description:
Treatment of collateral under collateralise to market approach
(1) Cash collateral received as Variation Margin by banks shall not be treated as
deposits, and the provisions of Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Interest
Rate on Deposits) Directions, 2016, as amended from time to time, shall not be
applicable to it.

treated as borrowings, and the provisions under Paragraph 5 of Part C of the
Master Direction - Risk Management and Inter-Bank Dealings, 2016, as amended
from time to time, shall not be applicable to it.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to margin requirements in a foreign jurisdiction
controls.control_description:
Margin requirements for cross-border transactions
(1) An NCCD transaction between a Domestic Covered Entity and a Foreign Covered
Entity may be subject to margin requirements in a foreign jurisdiction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to margin requirements in a foreign jurisdiction

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide to comply with these directions, or the margin requirements implemented by the foreign jurisdiction provided the margining framework in the for
controls.control_description:
A Domestic
Covered Entity and its counterparty in the foreign jurisdiction may decide to
comply with these Directions, or the margin requirements implemented by the
foreign jurisdiction provided the margining framework in the foreign jurisdiction is
assessed by the Domestic Covered Entity to be comparable to the requirements
in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to decide to comply with these directions, or the margin requirements implemented by the foreign jurisdiction provided the margining framework in the for

framework of the foreign jurisdictions based on the following broad principles:

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board-approved policy for the comparability assessment
controls.control_description:
(3) For this purpose, the Domestic Covered Entity shall put in place a Board-approved
policy for the comparability assessment.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board-approved policy for the comparability assessment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed before the risk management committee of the board/ equivalent body and subject to periodic review
controls.control_description:
The assessment of the margining
framework of each foreign jurisdiction shall be placed before the Risk
Management Committee of the Board/ equivalent body and subject to periodic
review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed before the risk management committee of the board/ equivalent body and subject to periodic review

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of the a

of a foreign jurisdiction shall comply with the provisions of the A.P.

margining framework of foreign jurisdictions vis-à-vis these Directions.

controls.control_objective: To ensure impose additional conditions to be met by the counterparties intending to comply with the margining framework of that jurisdiction

<image>

foreign jurisdiction, may impose additional conditions to be met by the
counterparties intending to comply with the margining framework of that
jurisdiction.

transaction with a Foreign Covered Entity if there is significant doubt regarding the
enforceability of close-out netting and/or collateral arrangements, subject to the
following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place appropriate internal limits and controls to manage its exposure to counterparties located in the jurisdiction
controls.control_description:

place appropriate internal limits and controls to manage its exposure to
counterparties located in the jurisdiction.

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that appropriate policies and procedures for dispute resolution are in place before undertaking an nccd transaction
controls.control_description:
Dispute resolution
(1) Counterparties shall ensure that appropriate policies and procedures for dispute
resolution are in place before undertaking an NCCD transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that appropriate policies and procedures for dispute resolution are in place before undertaking an nccd transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter-alia, include processes for determining discrepancies in material terms or valuations as disputes, mechanism for such disputes to be resolved
controls.control_description:
Such policies
and procedures shall, inter-alia, include processes for determining discrepancies
in material terms or valuations as disputes, mechanism for such disputes to be
resolved and escalation of material disputes to senior management, or to the
Board, as may be appropriate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter-alia, include processes for determining discrepancies in material terms or valuations as disputes, mechanism for such disputes to be resolved

controls.control_objective: To ensure exchange the non-disputed amount first and make all necessary and appropriate efforts, including timely initiation of dispute resolution protocols, to
controls.control_description:
(2) In case of a margin dispute, counterparties shall exchange the non-disputed
amount first and make all necessary and appropriate efforts, including timely
initiation of dispute resolution protocols, to resolve the dispute and exchange the
remaining Variation Margin amount in a time-bound manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exchange the non-disputed amount first and make all necessary and appropriate efforts, including timely initiation of dispute resolution protocols, to
